Document:
# Recently changed rules: These rules have recently been changed/added, they also appear on their respective page. This page is meant for our main playerbase to quickly view the changed/added rules.
## 22-March-2026: - Ship rules added to rulebook
## 16-March-2026: - Restructured the rulebook. - Removed guides that do not apply to this branch. - Marked chapters as outdated (marked for replacement later)
